sql_array: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_partition; CREATE TABLE test_partition (x Int32, y Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY x ORDER BY (y);
SELECT x, y, partitionID(x) AS partition_id FROM test_partition WHERE y > 15 ORDER BY partition_id;
UPDATE test_partition SET y = 100 WHERE x = 1 AND y = 20;
SELECT x, y, partitionID(x) AS partition_id FROM test_partition ORDER BY partition_id, y;
